name: testcraft
description: Turn an app's user flows into a complete, importer-ready test-case suite and an offline HTML console. Two chained skills: `userflow-to-testcases` authors cases FROM a flow doc (PDF/markdown/spec/screenshots) by modeling actor+resource state machines — per-transition cases with cross-flow downstream impact, an actor×resource matrix, end-to-end journeys, and a security/abuse (VAPT) pass — and `testcase-importer` normalizes any existing case data (xls/xlsx, CSV/TSV, PDF tables, pasted/markdown) into the canonical CSV and renders a single-file, filterable, offline console. Plus two subagents (`testcase-architect`, `testcase-vapt-auditor`) for heavy/parallel authoring and the adversarial pass. Every case is tagged Type (POS/NEG/VAPT) x Outcome (TN/TP/FP/FN!) with a dual-scale priority and one-line severity reasoning.
